auth_signup_pending_deletion: An account with this email is pending deletion. Sign in to restore it within 30 days.
auth_signup_pending_deletion_link: Sign in to restore your account
auth_reset_password_sent_body: We've sent a password reset link. Click it within an hour to set a new password.
auth_confirm_email_check_body: We've sent a confirmation link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
auth_confirm_email_registered_body: Your account has been created. You can now sign in.
auth_update_password_session_expired: Reset session expired — request a new link.
auth_confirm_invalid_link: Link expired or is invalid — request a new one.
auth_restore_account_scheduled: Will be permanently deleted on {date}. Until then you can restore it with a single click.
auth_form_password_too_short: Password must be at least {min} characters
account_danger_zone_body: Deleting your account will block access to all flashcards. You have 30 days to restore it after signing in again; after that, data is irreversibly erased.
account_delete_dialog_description: Your account will be marked for deletion. For 30 days you can restore it by signing in again. After that, flashcards and review history are irreversibly erased. To confirm, enter your email:
landing_hero_description: A production-ready starter with authentication, modern tooling, and a cosmic developer experience.
landing_feature_auth_body: Built-in Supabase auth with sign in, sign up, and protected routes out of the box.
landing_feature_stack_body: Astro 5, React 19, Tailwind 4, and TypeScript — the latest tools, ready to go.
landing_feature_dx_body: ESLint, Prettier, and pre-commit hooks keep your codebase clean from day one.
dashboard_auth_only: This page is only for authenticated users.
generate_page_intro: Signed in as {email}. Paste up to 10 000 characters below; proposals will stream in one-by-one.
generate_form_placeholder: Paste the passage you want to turn into flashcards...
generate_stream_interrupted: Generation interrupted — some proposals may be missing.
generate_empty_state_description: Generation finished with no results. Try pasting a different fragment of text.
review_page_intro: Signed in as {email}. Cards scheduled for today.
deck_page_intro: Signed in as {email}. Manage your flashcards: browse, edit, add, and delete.
deck_empty: Your deck is empty. Generate cards with AI or add them manually.
deck_dialog_new_description: Add a card manually. It will land at the top of your deck.
deck_dialog_edit_description: Only question and answer will be saved; review history stays intact.
deck_form_validation_empty: Question and answer cannot be empty.
deck_delete_confirm_body: This operation is irreversible and will also remove its review history.
config_supabase_missing: Supabase is not configured — authentication features are disabled.
error_unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_password_too_weak: Password is too weak — use at least 6 characters.
error_password_same_as_old: New password must be different from the previous one.
error_reset_session_expired: Reset session expired — request a new link.
error_reset_too_many_attempts: Too many attempts — try again in an hour.
error_account_delete_failed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
error_account_restore_failed: Failed to restore account. Please try again.
